title: erigeron microspermus
intro: Erigeron microspermus, also known as the small seeded fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron microspermus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Erigeron microspermus typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
